hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == *.json ]]; then python3 -c "import json,sys; json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))" "$f" 2>&1; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" =~ plugins/[^/]+/\.claude-plugin/plugin\.json ]]; then result=$(jq -e '.name and .version and .description' "$f" 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "[plugin.json hook] FAIL: $f is missing one or more required fields (name, version, description). Got: $result"; fi; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" =~ plugins/[^/]+/commands/[^/]+\.md ]]; then head -10 "$f" | grep -q '^description:' || echo "[commands hook] WARN: $f is missing 'description:' in front-matter."; head -10 "$f" | grep -q '^allowed-tools:' || echo "[commands hook] WARN: $f is missing 'allowed-tools:' in front-matter."; fi; }
